allow: Bash(node -e "const f = require\('fs'\); const s = f.statSync\('data/kickstarter.db'\); console.log\('DB size:', Math.round\(s.size/1024/1024\) + 'MB'\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('test.db'\); db.exec\('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t \(x TEXT\)'\); db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES \(?\)'\).run\('hello'\); const row = db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM t'\).get\(\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 works:', row.x\); db.close\(\); require\('fs'\).unlinkSync\('test.db'\);")

PowerShell($base = "http://localhost:3002"; @\("/api/stats", "/api/projects", "/api/categories", "/api/trends", "/api/countries", "/api/sync/status"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "$_ → $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\(\($r.Content\).Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "$_ → ERROR: $_" } })
